features: FIZZY LUXURY FOR RELAXING BATHS: Drop one of these bath fizzers into warm water for a bubbly, fragrant soak—perfect for unwinding after a long day or adding fun to your daily routine.
NATURAL MOISTURISING INGREDIENTS: Each bath bomb is enriched with moisturising natural elements that help hydrate, soften, and nourish the skin without harsh chemicals or residue.
GENTLE & VEGAN FRIENDLY FORMULA: These cruelty free & vegan friendly fizzers are safe for all skin types, making them an ideal travel wash or self-care treat for women, girls, and men alike.
FUN & SAFE FOR KIDS & TEENS: Loved by teenage girls, these colorful bath bombs offer a gentle fizzing experience, making bath time exciting and skin-friendly for kids as well.
BEAUTIFUL GIFT SET PACKAGING: Perfect for birthdays, Christmas, or self-pampering, this set is a great choice for bath gifts for women, teens, and even thoughtful surprises for men.
